productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Establish Navy Blue Shirt
description: CompositionBlue, green and yellow checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a narrow, slim collar with a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm buttoned tab, yoked back with contrast top-stitching, one pocket on left chest with stitch detail and branding and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its slim collar is just asking to be paired with a cowboy style shoestring tie. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
